name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza topped with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and olive oil.

name: Spicy Chicken Tacos
description: Grilled chicken with chili marinade, served in soft tortillas with salsa and avocado.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Mixed seasonal vegetables sautéed in a savory soy-ginger sauce, served over rice.

name: Beef Burger
description: Juicy grilled beef patty with cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato, and house sauce.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed with Caesar dressing, croutons, and parmesan cheese.

name: Pad Thai
description: Rice noodles stir-fried with shrimp, eggs, tofu, peanuts, and tamarind sauce.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a gooey molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Arborio rice cooked slowly with mushrooms, parmesan, and white wine.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Fresh salmon fillet grilled and served with lemon butter sauce and steamed vegetables.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea falafel wrapped in pita bread with tahini sauce and fresh vegetables.
